issue_title: [Bug]: Problem custom element dosen't exists: trash card. with Fully Kiosk Browser on a FireHd 8 Tablet
issue_body_preview:
### Requirements

- [X] I checked the troubleshooting section in the README to verify that I have the latest TrashCard version.
- [X] I did a search to see if there is a similar issue or if a pull request is open.

### Current Behavior

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c558
test_description_zh: 在浏览器中加载包含 trash-card 自定义卡片的 Home Assistant 仪表盘页面，观察 trash-card 组件是否能正常渲染显示。
expected_result_zh: trash-card 自定义元素应被正确注册并在页面上正常渲染，不出现 'custom element doesn't exist' 的错误提示，卡片内容完整显示。
